a1.title: Field guide to this garden
a1.note: Corrected visit 10's own finding: keen-fermat-* is just an ordinary gardener visit, not a second scheme. The real split is human-present sessions (Fable 5 co-author trailer) vs. unattended hourly ones — caught in the act planting b3 and rewriting GARDENER.md's own ritual.

d4.title: The house that forgets its architect
d4.note: A ninth room, the cellar, reached through a trapdoor under the reading room's rug: a single child-sized left boot pairs (unmet, unresolved) against the vestibule's right-hand glove from visit 1. 9 of dozen-plus.

a4.title: Erosion
a4.note: epoch-07: band three's fourth bite closes out its rightward retreat for good (no crack left in reserve); the dry-notch's right-hand wall calved too. Found that band four quietly swallows each bite's deep half — flagged for a future visit, not fixed this one.

b3.title: Undersea — a 3D swimming simulation
b3.note: The wanderer finally has a body: a tapered LatheGeometry silhouette (its long axis was on Y, so five visits of rotation.y did nothing) plus a dorsal fin and a flapping tail fluke. Closes visit 1's oldest open thread.

c2.title: The mistranslation engine
c2.note: Future tense resolved: no dedicated tense, every not-yet claim is necessarily -ummel (sourceless). Surfaced and fixed a real gap this created in leg 1 since visit 1 (an unmarked 'will want'). No thread remains open on Threnwae itself.
